summary: Provision new ECR repositories. Every stand-up routes to an engineer for review — day-2 operations on existing repositories land in a later wave.

operations.title: Provision a new ECR repository
operations.summary: Request a brand-new container image repository; an engineer finalizes and reviews the Terraform before it applies.
operations.description: Stand up a new ECR repository as a complete specification: tag mutability, vulnerability scanning, and encryption. Submitting routes it to an engineer with a draft Terraform block to review and finish — nothing is applied without review.

params.name: repo_name
params.label: Repository name
params.help: Lower-case letters, numbers, dots, dashes and slashes, like team/checkout-api. Names the repository in AWS and in the generated draft.

params.name: image_tag_mutability
params.label: Image tag mutability
params.help: IMMUTABLE blocks overwriting a pushed tag — the safer default for production images.

params.name: scan_on_push
params.label: Scan on push
params.help: Automatically scans every pushed image for known vulnerabilities.

params.name: encryption_type
params.label: Encryption type
params.help: KMS lets you pick a customer-managed key below; AES256 uses an AWS-owned key at no extra cost.

params.name: kms_key
params.label: Encryption key
params.help: Required when encryption type is KMS; leave blank for AES256.

params.name: force_delete
params.label: Force delete
params.help: Off — deleting a repository that still has images fails safely instead of silently destroying them; written into the draft, never asked.

params.name: resource_name
params.label: Name tag
params.help: Shown as the name everywhere — consoles, tickets, this portal.

params.name: description_tag
params.label: What this repository does
params.help: One line an operator can act on at 3 AM.

params.name: pic
params.label: Person in charge
params.help: Who to call about this repository.

decisions: A lifecycle policy (expiring untagged or old images) is an engineer follow-up after creation
Cross-account or public replication and a repository policy are engineer decisions
